scripts.test:rules: npm run test:rules:firestore && npm run test:rules:storage
scripts.test:rules:firestore: firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --project edunova-aabd1 --only firestore "vitest run --config vitest.rules.config.ts src/__tests__/rules/firestore.rules.test.ts"
scripts.test:rules:storage: firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --project edunova-aabd1 --only storage "vitest run --config vitest.rules.config.ts src/__tests__/rules/storage.rules.test.ts"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --config ..\firebase.json --only auth,firestore,functions,storage --project edunova-aabd1
